scripts.dev: concurrently -c "cyan,magenta,yellow,blue" -n "frontend,backend,types,utils" "pnpm --filter @boilerplate/frontend dev" "pnpm --filter @boilerplate/backend dev" "pnpm --filter shared-types dev" "pnpm --filter shared-utils dev"
scripts.build: concurrently -c "cyan,magenta,yellow,blue" -n "frontend,backend,types,utils" "pnpm --filter @boilerplate/frontend build" "pnpm --filter @boilerplate/backend build" "pnpm --filter shared-types build" "pnpm --filter shared-utils build"
